title: Trailing Drawdown Explained (2026): The Floor You Can't See That Closes Most Funded Accounts
description: A canonical 2026 explainer of how prop-firm trailing drawdown actually works — intraday HWM vs EOD trail, the SB vs SB+$100 lock point, and why most blown funded accounts die to a rule the trader never saw.

og.title: Trailing Drawdown Explained: The Floor You Can't See That Closes Most Funded Accounts
og.description: The mechanic-level explainer of prop-firm trailing drawdown: how the floor moves, where it locks, and why Topstep, Apex 4.0, MFFU, TPT, Tradeify, Bulenox, and Earn2Trade do it differently.
